---
title: "04 — Feature Engineering for Random Forest"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = TRUE, warning = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "C:/Users/ammonsj/Ideas")
source("C:/Users/ammonsj/Ideas/_config.R")
source("C:/Users/ammonsj/Ideas/R/helpers.R")
```

## Load scored articles

We build features on a training sample (manageable size), then score
the full corpus in the next step.

```{r load-data}
library(arrow)
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)

# Cache guard: skip feature engineering if outputs already exist
outpath <- file.path(DATA_PANELS, "rf_features.parquet")
svd_path <- file.path(MODELS_DIR, "svd_model_info.rds")

if (file.exists(outpath) && file.exists(svd_path)) {
  message("Feature matrix and SVD model already exist. Skipping feature engineering.")
  message("  Features: ", outpath)
  message("  SVD model: ", svd_path)
  feature_df <- as.data.table(read_parquet(outpath))
  knitr::knit_exit()
}

scored_dir <- file.path(DATA_PARQUET, "articles_scored")
scored_files <- list.files(scored_dir, pattern = "\\.parquet$", full.names = TRUE)

# For feature engineering + RF training, sample articles
# Use stratified sample: ~500K articles across all decades
set.seed(SEED)

all_articles <- open_dataset(scored_files)
total_n <- all_articles |> count() |> collect() |> pull(n)
message("Total scored articles: ", total_n)

# Sample rate to get ~500K articles
sample_rate <- min(1.0, 500000 / total_n)
message("Sampling at rate: ", round(sample_rate, 4))

# Read data in chunks by year file to avoid memory blow-up
sample_list <- list()
target_per_file <- ceiling(500000 / length(scored_files))

for (sf in scored_files) {
  chunk <- as.data.table(read_parquet(sf))
  if (nrow(chunk) > target_per_file) {
    idx <- sample(nrow(chunk), target_per_file)
    chunk <- chunk[idx, ]
  }
  sample_list[[length(sample_list) + 1]] <- chunk
  rm(chunk); gc()
}
sample_df <- rbindlist(sample_list, fill = TRUE)
rm(sample_list); gc()

# Final trim to 500K if needed
if (nrow(sample_df) > 500000) {
  idx <- sample(nrow(sample_df), 500000)
  sample_df <- sample_df[idx, ]
}

dt <- as.data.table(sample_df)
rm(sample_df)
gc()

message("Working with ", nrow(dt), " articles for feature engineering")
```

## Build text features (TF-IDF -> SVD)

```{r text-features}
library(quanteda)
library(irlba)

# Create corpus from article text
corp <- corpus(dt$article)

# Tokenize
toks <- tokens(corp, remove_punct = TRUE, remove_numbers = TRUE,
               remove_symbols = TRUE) |>
  tokens_tolower() |>
  tokens_remove(stopwords("en")) |>
  tokens_wordstem()

# Document-feature matrix
dfmat <- dfm(toks)

# Trim to top 10,000 features
dfmat <- dfm_trim(dfmat, min_termfreq = 50, min_docfreq = 20)
dfmat <- dfm_select(dfmat, names(topfeatures(dfmat, 10000)))
message("DFM dimensions: ", nrow(dfmat), " x ", ncol(dfmat))

# TF-IDF weighting
dfmat_tfidf <- dfm_tfidf(dfmat)

# ----- CRITICAL: Save IDF weights for scoring-time replay -----
# At scoring time, we must apply the SAME IDF weights learned here,
# not recompute them per-chunk (which would distort features).
# quanteda's dfm_tfidf() defaults:
#   scheme_tf = "count"  (raw term counts, unchanged)
#   scheme_df = "inverse" (log10(N / df_t))
#   base = 10
# So: tfidf(t,d) = count(t,d) * log10(N / df_t)
# We save the IDF vector to replay the exact same transformation.
idf_weights <- log10(nrow(dfmat) / docfreq(dfmat))
names(idf_weights) <- featnames(dfmat)
message("IDF weights computed for ", length(idf_weights), " features",
        " (log10 base, matching quanteda defaults)")

# --- Verification: ensure manual IDF matches quanteda's output exactly ---
# Spot-check on a random subset of 500 rows to avoid materializing
# two full dense matrices (~80 GB for 500K x 10K each).
n_check <- min(500L, nrow(dfmat))
check_idx <- sample(nrow(dfmat), n_check)
manual_tfidf_sub <- sweep(as.matrix(dfmat[check_idx, ]), 2, idf_weights, `*`)
quanteda_tfidf_sub <- as.matrix(dfmat_tfidf[check_idx, ])
idf_check <- all.equal(manual_tfidf_sub, quanteda_tfidf_sub, tolerance = 1e-10)
if (!isTRUE(idf_check)) {
  stop("IDF weight verification FAILED! Manual IDF does not match dfm_tfidf() output.\n",
       "  Mismatch details: ", idf_check, "\n",
       "  Check quanteda version and dfm_tfidf default parameters.")
}
message("IDF weight verification PASSED on ", n_check,
        " random rows — manual weights match dfm_tfidf() exactly.")
rm(manual_tfidf_sub, quanteda_tfidf_sub, idf_check, check_idx, n_check)

# Free un-weighted DFM now — no longer needed after IDF computation
# This releases ~500K x 10K sparse matrix BEFORE dense materialization
rm(dfmat)
gc()

# Convert to matrix for SVD
mat <- as.matrix(dfmat_tfidf)

# SVD to 200 components (reduced from 300 for memory)
# set.seed here because the earlier seed (line 40) was consumed by sampling;
# prcomp_irlba uses random initialization internally
set.seed(SEED)
message("Running SVD...")
n_components <- min(200, ncol(mat) - 1)
svd_result <- prcomp_irlba(mat, n = n_components, center = TRUE, scale. = FALSE)

svd_df <- as.data.table(svd_result$x)
names(svd_df) <- paste0("svd_", seq_len(ncol(svd_df)))
message("SVD components: ", ncol(svd_df))

# Save SVD model info BEFORE cleanup so we can score new articles later
# We need: rotation matrix, center vector, vocabulary, AND IDF weights
svd_vocab <- featnames(dfmat_tfidf)
saveRDS(list(
  center = svd_result$center,
  rotation = svd_result$rotation,
  vocab = svd_vocab,
  n_components = n_components,
  idf_weights = idf_weights  # <-- NEW: saved for scoring-time replay
), file.path(MODELS_DIR, "svd_model_info.rds"))
message("Saved SVD model info + IDF weights for corpus scoring.")

# Clean up large objects (dfmat already freed before dense materialization)
rm(corp, toks, dfmat_tfidf, mat, svd_result, svd_vocab)
gc()
```

## Combine text features with metadata features

```{r combine-features}
# Metadata features
# NOTE: Lexicon sub-scores (insult_score, dehumanize_score, etc.) are
# EXCLUDED to avoid data leakage — the pseudo-labels are derived from
# the aggregate uncivil_score, which is a function of these sub-scores.
# Including them would let the RF memorize the label function rather than
# learning genuine textual patterns from the SVD features.
#
# Guard: Some metadata columns may not exist in very early years (pre-1850s).
# Create them with safe defaults if absent, so the code doesn't error.
for (col in c("front_page", "headline_length", "n_words",
              "has_byline", "ocr_quality", "page_num")) {
  if (!col %in% names(dt)) {
    dt[, (col) := 0L]
    message("  NOTE: Column '", col, "' missing from data — created with default 0")
  }
}

meta_features <- dt[, .(
  front_page,
  headline_length,
  n_words,
  has_byline,
  ocr_quality,
  page_num
)]

# Guard against NAs in metadata columns (common in historical data)
meta_features[is.na(headline_length), headline_length := 0L]
meta_features[is.na(has_byline), has_byline := 0L]
meta_features[is.na(front_page), front_page := 0L]
# Use 0 for missing ocr_quality to match scoring-time imputation
meta_features[is.na(ocr_quality), ocr_quality := 0]
meta_features[is.na(page_num), page_num := 0L]
meta_features[is.na(n_words), n_words := 0L]

# Combine
feature_df <- cbind(
  dt[, .(article_id, newspaper_name, year, year_month, uncivil_score)],
  meta_features,
  svd_df
)

# Save feature matrix
outpath <- file.path(DATA_PANELS, "rf_features.parquet")
write_parquet(feature_df, outpath)
message("Saved feature matrix: ", nrow(feature_df), " rows x ",
        ncol(feature_df), " cols -> ", outpath)

# SVD model already saved above (before cleanup)
```

## Feature summary

```{r feature-summary}
message("\nFeature matrix summary:")
message("  Rows: ", nrow(feature_df))
message("  Columns: ", ncol(feature_df))
message("  SVD components: ", sum(grepl("^svd_", names(feature_df))))
message("  Metadata features: front_page, headline_length, n_words, ",
        "has_byline, ocr_quality, page_num (sub-scores excluded to prevent leakage)")

# Distribution of pseudo-labels
q90 <- quantile(feature_df$uncivil_score, 0.90, na.rm = TRUE)
q50 <- quantile(feature_df$uncivil_score, 0.50, na.rm = TRUE)
message("\n  Uncivil score p90: ", round(q90, 3))
message("  Uncivil score p50: ", round(q50, 3))
message("  Articles above p90 (pseudo-incivil): ",
        sum(feature_df$uncivil_score >= q90, na.rm = TRUE))
message("  Articles below p50 (pseudo-civil): ",
        sum(feature_df$uncivil_score <= q50, na.rm = TRUE))
```
